# LLM Usage Guidance for movingagain.com.au

Moving Again is a public marketing site. The canonical quote and callback API contract lives on the Moving Again quote host:

- Agent/API guide: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/agents
- Agent/API examples: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/agents/examples
- Moving Again agent landing page: https://movingagain.com.au/agents
- Moving Again agent examples: https://movingagain.com.au/agents/examples
- Moving Again OpenAPI alias: https://movingagain.com.au/openapi.json
- Moving Again quote capability alias: https://movingagain.com.au/quote-capability.json
- Quote capability manifest: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/quote-capability.json
- Quote AI catalog: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/.well-known/ai-catalog.json
- Quote AI plugin compatibility manifest: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Quote OpenAPI schema: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/openapi.json
- Quote well-known OpenAPI schema: https://removalistquotes.movingagain.com.au/.well-known/openapi.json

Agents may use the quote host for customer-authorised household quote, vehicle quote, and callback requests. Omit tenant for public host-aware submissions unless Moveroo has supplied a tenant slug.

Public marketing pages on movingagain.com.au are for service discovery and citation. Do not treat this marketing domain as the API execution host.
